name: Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the State of Qatar
address: Embassy of the State of Qatar in London, 1 South Audley Street, London W1K 1NB

payments.payer_name: Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the State of Qatar
payments.summary:
International visit to Qatar between 05 December 2025 and 08 December 2025 — The Doha Forum is held annually with the aim of promoting dialogue, bringing together leaders in policy making to discuss challenges facing the world.

This year's speakers included Bill Gates, Hillary Clinton, Donald Trump Jnr and leaders of Qatar, Syria, Lebanon
payments.description: Flights (£8,075) and accommodation, food and beverage (£400)

payments.payer_name: Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the State of Qatar
payments.summary: International visit to Qatar between 19 May 2025 and 23 May 2025 — Attending the Bloomberg Qatar Economic Forum 2025 and to meet with Ministers and associated organisations to discuss Qatar's leading role in peace negotiations and humanitarian issues globally.
payments.description: Flights (£3200), hotel (approx. £1400), local transportation (approx £500) and food (approx. £600)
